Swollen Lymph Nodes: Causes and Treatment
Article
entries.chunkText: Android Kotlin Flow and StateFlow patterns for reactive ViewModel architecture and unidirectional data flow in modern Android development

entries.title: Thread
entries.chunkText: My sourdough starter doubled overnight after feeding with rye flour and water. Here are my notes on maintaining a healthy bread starter culture.

entries.title: Notes
entries.chunkText: Electric vehicle home charging: Level 2 vs DC fast charging infrastructure. Installation costs and grid capacity considerations for EV owners.

entries.title: Doc
entries.chunkText: React performance patterns: useCallback prevents function recreation on each render, useMemo caches expensive calculations, React.memo wraps components to skip unnecessary re-renders. Use React Profiler to identify bottlenecks before optimizing.

entries.title: Issue
entries.chunkText: PostgreSQL slow query investigation: EXPLAIN ANALYZE showed sequential scan on 10M row orders table. Added composite index on (customer_id, created_at), query time dropped from 4.2s to 12ms. Also enabled pg_stat_statements for monitoring.

entries.title: Health log
entries.chunkText: Sleep tracking with Oura ring: averaging 6.2 hours total. REM sleep consistently low on evenings with alcohol or late-night screen time. Blue light blocking glasses improved sleep onset time. Aiming for 7.5h target.

entries.title: Daily notes
entries.chunkText: Japan trip planning for April: cherry blossom (sakura) peak usually March 25-April 10 in Tokyo and Kyoto. Need to reserve Shinkansen JR Pass. Ryokan vs hotel debate: ryokan more authentic but less central.

entries.title: Doc
entries.chunkText: Sourdough hydration tests: 70% gave open crumb but very sticky dough. 65% more workable. Autolyse 45 min before folding in levain helps gluten development. Bulk ferment at 78F for 5 hours, then overnight cold proof.

entries.title: Note
entries.chunkText: Half marathon training plan: 16-week base building. Weeks 1-4 run 25-30 miles/week at easy pace (zone 2 heart rate). Long run max 12 miles. Strength training 2x/week. Avoid back-to-back long run and tempo days.

entries.title: API decision log
entries.chunkText: Decided to adopt GraphQL for the new dashboard. REST still used for mobile API. GraphQL benefits: client-specified fields, reduces over-fetching, type safety via schema. Using Apollo Server with codegen for type-safe resolvers.

entries.title: Gist
entries.chunkText: Redis caching strategies: cache-aside for read-heavy workloads, write-through for consistency, TTL tuning to prevent stale data. Key eviction: use allkeys-lru for cache-only Redis. Avoid storing large objects over 1MB.

entries.title: Note
entries.chunkText: TypeScript generics and utility types: use Generic<T> for reusable functions, Partial<T> and Required<T> for object transformations, Record<K,V> for typed dictionaries, ReturnType<F> to infer function return types.
